betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Bricked Furnace§f

§aA furnace with speed bonuses for construction materials and firebricks.§f

The §bBricked Furnace§f gets §e2× speed§f on construction materials (sand, cobblestone) and §e4× speed§f on clay and fireclay. It also produces ashes from burnt fuel.

§6Crafting§f:
Made from bricks and stone at a crafting table.

§6Other Furnace Types§f:
§b• Iron Furnace§f: 20% faster, fuel-efficient, supports speed upgrades
§b• Steel Furnace§f: TU-powered, 3-slot processing, bonus output
§b• Electric Furnace§f: powered by electricity, clean automation

§eTip§f: Use this furnace for bulk firebrick production — the 4× speed makes it unbeatable for that job.
